Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Thomas P. Jackovics Production Of Esi For Inspection And Copying Per Demand For Production Served In Connection With The Deposition Notice, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances at the 9:00 am hearing. A Conference call is to be held at 3:00 pm today, where the matter is to be taken under submission. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JAMES ROSENFIELD's Motion To Compel Defendant Thomas P. Jackovics Production Of Esi For Inspection And Copying Per Demand For Production Served In Connection With The Deposition Notice, And Request For Sanctions.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Thomas P. Jackovics Production Of Esi For Inspection And Copying Per Demand For Production Served In Connection With The Deposition Notice, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-14-2019 Continued To Apr-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gene Halavanau, Esq., Telephone 415-692-5301, appearing for Plaintiff;
Ariana A. Cardoza, Esq., Bledsoe, Diestel, et al, Telephone 415-981-5411, appearing for Defendant Thomas P. Jackovics;
